summary: N14 stage A1 ADMITTED (OVERALL PASS): the linear characteristic psi0 chain closes exactly against the N12 datum. Bondi-like J from the corrected Teukolsky solution = angular metric part (3/4)s^2[F4/r+2F3/r^2+3F2/r^3+3F1/r^4+3F0/r^5] PLUS the g_{r theta}-removing angular gauge shift (xi^th from -h_rth/r^2, xi(scri)=0): the shift cancels the F3/r^2 term EXACTLY (C1), restoring peeling. Linearized eq:psi0cce (psi0 = -J'/(2r) - J''/4 at fixed u) on J_full gives (3/4)s^2[(3/2)F2/r^5 + 9F1/r^6 + 9F0/r^7]: leading coefficient 9/8 = sqrt(27pi/10)*(1/4)sqrt(15/2pi) EXACTLY (C2, sympy), no term below r^-5 (C4), numeric closure 4.4e-34 (C3, mpmath FD).
